category_sources: Official trzsz site describes trzsz as a modern tmux-compatible file transfer tool.
source_facts.description describes simple file transfer tools similar to lrzsz and compatible with tmux.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation fallback.
Official trzsz documentation has a dedicated Go document page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official trzsz site describes trzsz tools for terminal file transfer and documents the Go version.
source_facts.description identifies tmux-compatible file transfer tools.
